name: blue-pomodoro
title: BluePomodoro
description: Integrate BluePomodoro flow into Raycast. Manage your pomodoros, tasks, and productivity stats.
author: joaquin_gonzalez

commands.name: focus-timer
commands.title: Focus Timer
commands.subtitle: BluePomodoro
commands.description: Start, pause, and control your pomodoro sessions.

commands.name: manage-tasks
commands.title: Manage Tasks
commands.subtitle: BluePomodoro
commands.description: View, create, and focus on active tasks.

commands.name: stats
commands.title: Productivity Stats
commands.subtitle: BluePomodoro
commands.description: View your streak, points, and daily/monthly stats.

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Menu Bar Timer
commands.subtitle: BluePomodoro
commands.description: Indicator and control panel in the macOS menu bar.

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Get this token from the Global Settings tab in your BluePomodoro web app.

preferences.name: baseUrl
preferences.title: Base URL
preferences.description: The URL of your hosted BluePomodoro app.
